title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: My sister is more intelligent than me.

questions.firstSentence: Somebody had already eaten all the sandwiches.
It was too late for us to catch the last train.
questions.secondSentence: We didn't leave (1) _________ to catch the last train.

questions.firstSentence: She continued talking on her phone during dinner.
questions.secondSentence: She (1) _________ on her phone during dinner.

questions.firstSentence: He was in the habit of staying up late.
Despite feeling nervous, she gave a great presentation.
questions.secondSentence: She gave a great presentation (1) _________ nervous.

questions.firstSentence: The secretary will send all the invitations tomorrow.
questions.secondSentence: All the invitations will be (1) _________ tomorrow.
